description.en: Apps, websites, dashboards, social screenshots, and product interfaces.
description.zh: App、网页、仪表盘、社媒截图与产品界面。

description.en: Infographics, knowledge maps, technical explainers, and structured diagrams.
description.zh: 信息图、知识图谱、技术解释与结构化图解。

description.en: Event posters, covers, type-driven visuals, and strong layout compositions.
description.zh: 活动海报、封面、字体视觉和强排版画面。

description.en: Product shots, detail pages, packaging, selling points, and ads.
description.zh: 商品图、详情页、包装卖点和商业广告。

description.en: Logos, identity systems, brand touchpoints, and campaign visuals.
description.zh: Logo、VI、品牌触点和 Campaign 视觉系统。

description.en: Architecture renders, interiors, city maps, and spatial concepts.
description.zh: 建筑表现、室内空间、城市地图和空间概念。

description.en: Portraits, phone photography, film texture, and commercial photography.
description.zh: 人像、手机纪实、胶片质感和商业摄影。

description.en: Illustration, art styles, material experiments, and decorative images.
description.zh: 插画、艺术风格、材质实验和装饰画面。

description.en: Character design, pose references, cards, and 3D toys.
description.zh: 角色设定、动作参考、卡牌和 3D 玩具。

description.en: Storyboards, narrative scenes, livestream frames, and worldbuilding.
description.zh: 分镜、故事场景、直播画面和世界观叙事。

description.en: Classical scrolls, historical figures, traditional themes, and poetry visuals.
description.zh: 古风长卷、历史人物、传统题材和诗词画面。

description.en: White papers, manuals, encyclopedic plates, and publishing layouts.
description.zh: 白皮书、手册、百科图鉴和出版页设计。

description.en: Creative experiments, special tasks, mixed workflows, and practical cases.
description.zh: 创意实验、特殊任务、混合玩法和实用场景。

description.en: High-fidelity app, web, dashboard, and social interface prompts.
description.zh: 生成 App、网页、仪表盘、社媒截图等高保真界面。

useWhen.en: Use for app screens, dashboards, social screenshots, and live interface mockups.
useWhen.zh: 用于 App 截图、仪表盘、社媒截图和直播界面。

en: Lock platform, aspect ratio, layout hierarchy, and exact visible text.
Specify UI chrome such as status bars, tabs, action rows, or comment layers.
zh: 锁定平台、比例、层级和画面文字。
明确状态栏、Tab、操作区、评论层等 UI 元素。

en: Avoid vague platform names and generic app mockups.
Constrain text readability and platform-specific details.
zh: 避免平台描述过泛。
约束文字可读性和平台特征。

description.en: Structured diagrams, timelines, knowledge maps, and explainers.
description.zh: 生成结构化图解、时间线、知识图谱和技术解释图。

useWhen.en: Use for explainer graphics, technical diagrams, timelines, and knowledge cards.
useWhen.zh: 用于解释图、技术图解、时间线和知识卡片。

en: Define 3-5 modules, information flow, visual hierarchy, and short labels.
Use color groups, arrows, icons, and clean spacing to reduce clutter.
zh: 定义 3-5 个模块、信息流、层级和短标签。
用色块、箭头、图标和留白控制复杂度。

en: Avoid long paragraphs inside the image.
Limit module count before adding visual detail.
zh: 避免把长段正文塞进画面。
先限制模块数量，再补视觉细节。

description.en: Multi-scale science visuals with readable labels and hierarchy.
description.zh: 生成多尺度科学信息图，强调层级、标签和可读性。

useWhen.en: Use when the topic needs micro-to-macro scale comparison and labeled detail windows.
useWhen.zh: 用于需要从微观到宏观展示尺度变化的科普主题。

en: Use 6-8 scale frames and keep each label short.
Show units, magnification, and distinct scale detail.
zh: 使用 6-8 个尺度框，每个标签保持短句。
展示单位、倍率和不同尺度的细节。

en: Avoid making every scale frame visually identical.
Avoid generic magnifying glass icon layouts.
zh: 避免所有尺度框长得一样。
避免通用放大镜式布局。

description.en: Event, product, movie, and social poster compositions.
description.zh: 生成活动、产品、电影和社媒传播海报。

useWhen.en: Use for event posters, movie posters, covers, and social campaign visuals.
useWhen.zh: 用于活动海报、电影海报、封面和社媒传播视觉。

en: Lock subject, headline, layout, palette, and aspect ratio.
Make the title hierarchy and primary visual clear.
zh: 锁定主体、标题、版式、配色和比例。
突出标题层级和主视觉。

en: Avoid mixed moodboards or process sheets when asking for one finished poster.
Constrain extra text and decorative symbols.
zh: 需要成品海报时，避免生成拼贴展示板。
约束多余文字和装饰符号。

description.en: Commercial sports visuals with athletes, props, and brand color.
description.zh: 生成运动员、道具、品牌色统一的商业运动海报。

useWhen.en: Use for sports brand campaigns, athlete posters, and product-led sport visuals.
useWhen.zh: 用于运动品牌 Campaign、运动员海报和运动产品视觉。

en: Define sport, athlete pose, hero prop, title, and brand palette.
Use dramatic light, clean composition, and readable data overlays.
zh: 定义运动项目、姿态、核心道具、标题和品牌色。
使用强光影、干净构图和可读数据层。

en: Avoid wrong equipment and noisy collage.
Keep the athlete and hero prop visually dominant.
zh: 避免错误运动器材和杂乱拼贴。
让运动员和核心道具占据主导。

description.en: Premium title-led posters with strong typographic systems.
description.zh: 生成以标题文字为主视觉的高级字体海报。

useWhen.en: Use when the exact title must become the main visual structure.
useWhen.zh: 用于标题文字需要成为主视觉结构的海报。

en: Make typography the hero and spell the title exactly.
Tie human figures, objects, or landscapes to the title meaning.
zh: 让字体成为画面主角，并保证标题拼写准确。
人物、物体或风景需要服务标题含义。

en: Avoid default word art, unrelated icons, and misspelled title text.
Limit the color system to a restrained palette.
zh: 避免默认字效、无关图标和标题错字。
控制配色数量，保持克制。

description.en: Chinese ink, portrait, and layered atmosphere composition.
description.zh: 生成水墨、人像与层叠氛围结合的视觉海报。

useWhen.en: Use for poetic portrait posters, ink atmospheres, and layered cultural visuals.
useWhen.zh: 用于诗意人像海报、水墨氛围和文化主题视觉。

en: Blend portrait silhouette, ink texture, atmosphere, and negative space.
Keep composition quiet, premium, and readable.
zh: 融合人像剪影、水墨质感、氛围和留白。
保持构图克制、高级、可读。

en: Avoid cheap fantasy collage and overloaded scenery.
Use subtle text or no text unless required.
zh: 避免廉价奇幻拼贴和景物堆叠。
非必要时减少文字。

description.en: Minimal product-style science posters for natural subjects.
description.zh: 生成极简产品感自然科普海报。

useWhen.en: Use for natural subjects that need a premium, clean science poster feel.
useWhen.zh: 用于自然主题的高级、干净科普海报。

en: Use a clear subject, minimal copy, soft shadows, and disciplined whitespace.
Keep the scientific label short and visible.
zh: 使用清晰主体、少量文案、柔和阴影和充足留白。
让科普标签短而清楚。

en: Avoid heavy advertising language.
Avoid dense encyclopedia blocks.
zh: 避免广告感太重。
避免密集百科正文。

description.en: Product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts.
description.zh: 生成商品图、包装、详情页和卖点排版。

useWhen.en: Use for product hero shots, packaging visuals, detail pages, and sales layouts.
useWhen.zh: 用于商品主图、包装视觉、详情页和销售卖点排版。

en: Define product, selling points, material, scene, lighting, and layout blocks.
Separate hero product, benefit labels, and supporting props.
zh: 定义商品、卖点、材质、场景、光线和版块。
区分主商品、卖点标签和辅助道具。

en: Avoid random props that weaken product recognition.
Constrain packaging text and claim wording.
zh: 避免无关道具削弱商品识别。
约束包装文字和卖点表达。

description.en: Recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products.
description.zh: 生成美妆与生活方式产品的推荐报告版式。

useWhen.en: Use for beauty recommendations, skin reports, shopping assistants, and lifestyle product cards.
useWhen.zh: 用于美妆推荐、肤质报告、导购助手和生活方式商品卡片。

en: Use a report-like hierarchy with diagnosis, recommendation, and product cards.
Keep product images, labels, and ratings aligned.
zh: 使用诊断、推荐和商品卡片的报告层级。
对齐商品图、标签和评分。

en: Avoid medical claims and unreadable dense notes.
Keep recommendation logic simple.
zh: 避免医疗化结论和难读小字。
保持推荐逻辑清楚。

description.en: Logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints.
description.zh: 生成 Logo、配色、字体、应用触点与品牌系统。

useWhen.en: Use for logo systems, brand boards, visual identity kits, and application mockups.
useWhen.zh: 用于 Logo 系统、品牌板、VI 套件和应用样机。

en: Define brand name, positioning, palette, typography, logo usage, and touchpoints.
Ask for a coherent board with aligned applications.
zh: 定义品牌名、定位、配色、字体、Logo 用法和触点。
要求视觉板中的应用统一对齐。

en: Avoid unrelated logo variants and inconsistent palettes.
Keep brand text accurate.
zh: 避免无关 Logo 变体和混乱配色。
保持品牌文字准确。

description.en: Campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts.
description.zh: 生成包装、社媒、网页和展示场景里的品牌触点板。

useWhen.en: Use for multi-touchpoint campaign boards and brand rollout previews.
useWhen.zh: 用于多触点 Campaign 展示和品牌落地预览。

en: Specify touchpoint list, shared visual rules, and mockup arrangement.
Use one palette and one typography logic across all panels.
zh: 指定触点清单、统一视觉规则和样机排列。
让所有面板共享配色和字体逻辑。

en: Avoid mixing many unrelated campaign styles.
Limit touchpoints if readability drops.
zh: 避免混入多个无关 Campaign 风格。
可读性下降时减少触点数量。

description.en: Interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals.
description.zh: 生成室内、建筑、城市地图和空间概念视觉。

useWhen.en: Use for interiors, architecture renders, city maps, spatial plans, and environment concepts.
useWhen.zh: 用于室内、建筑表现、城市地图、空间规划和环境概念图。

en: Define viewpoint, scale, material, lighting, and spatial function.
For maps, specify landmarks, labels, border decoration, and visual accuracy level.
zh: 定义视角、尺度、材质、光线和空间功能。
地图需要指定地标、标签、边框装饰和准确度。

en: Avoid impossible perspectives unless the output is conceptual.
Lock map label language and relative placement.
zh: 概念图之外要避免不合理透视。
锁定地图标签语言和相对位置。

description.en: Lens, lighting, film texture, and documentary-style photo prompts.
description.zh: 控制镜头、光线、胶片质感和纪实摄影效果。

useWhen.en: Use for portraits, street photos, product photography, and cinematic realism.
useWhen.zh: 用于人像、街拍、商品摄影和电影感写实。

en: Specify camera distance, lens, light source, texture, background, and motion.
Use believable imperfections for documentary realism.
zh: 指定机位、镜头、光源、质感、背景和动作。
加入可信的小瑕疵增强纪实感。

en: Avoid over-polished plastic skin unless commercial beauty is required.
Add negative constraints for hands, text, and anatomy when needed.
zh: 商业美妆之外，避免过度磨皮。
需要时加入手部、文字、结构类负面约束。

description.en: Realistic phone-photo scenes with negative constraints.
description.zh: 生成手机纪实风街头瞬间，并加入负面约束。

useWhen.en: Use for candid street moments, accidental spills, documentary phone shots, and fast action.
useWhen.zh: 用于街头抓拍、意外泼洒、手机纪实和快速动作。

en: Describe the exact moment, camera height, motion blur, and street context.
Add negative constraints for staged poses and fake ad lighting.
zh: 描述具体瞬间、机位高度、运动模糊和街景。
加入避免摆拍和广告棚拍感的限制。

en: Avoid too-clean compositions.
Keep the event plausible and grounded.
zh: 避免画面过于干净。
让事件看起来可信。

description.en: Anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction.
description.zh: 生成动漫、水彩、水墨、材质实验和艺术风格图。

useWhen.en: Use for anime, watercolor, ink, decorative art, and style experiments.
useWhen.zh: 用于动漫、水彩、水墨、装饰画和风格实验。

en: Define composition, subject, palette, brush material, mood, and rendering depth.
For reference images, state what must be preserved.
zh: 定义构图、主体、配色、笔触材质、情绪和完成度。
参考图任务需要说明保留哪些特征。

en: Avoid style-only prompts without composition.
Lock character identity when using references.
zh: 避免只写风格，不写构图。
使用参考图时锁定角色识别。

description.en: Characters, pose sheets, action grids, and identity consistency.
description.zh: 生成角色设定、动作分解和一致性参考。

useWhen.en: Use for character sheets, pose grids, action breakdowns, and identity references.
useWhen.zh: 用于角色设定表、动作网格、动作拆解和一致性参考。

en: Define identity anchors, outfit, proportions, pose count, and sheet layout.
Keep face, hairstyle, and costume details consistent.
zh: 定义身份锚点、服装、比例、动作数量和版式。
保持脸、发型和服装细节一致。

en: Avoid changing costume details between poses.
Limit pose count if the sheet becomes crowded.
zh: 避免不同动作里服装细节变化。
画面拥挤时减少动作数量。

description.en: Reference photo to premium 3D collectible figure prompts.
description.zh: 把参考图转换成高级 3D 收藏玩具效果。

useWhen.en: Use for premium collectible figures, avatar toys, blind-box characters, and 3D display renders.
useWhen.zh: 用于高级收藏玩具、头像公仔、潮玩角色和 3D 展示图。

en: Preserve face and outfit anchors from the reference.
Specify material, packaging, base, lighting, and collectible scale.
zh: 保留参考图中的脸和服装锚点。
指定材质、包装、底座、光线和收藏比例。

en: Avoid generic toy bodies without identity details.
Keep packaging text minimal and accurate.
zh: 避免没有身份细节的通用玩具。
包装文字保持少量且准确。

description.en: Storyboards, worldbuilding, narrative scenes, and emotional pacing.
description.zh: 生成分镜、世界观、故事场景和情绪节奏。

useWhen.en: Use for storyboards, worldbuilding, live scenes, and emotional narrative frames.
useWhen.zh: 用于分镜、世界观、直播场景和情绪叙事画面。

en: Define who, where, when, conflict, emotion, and camera framing.
Use scene details to support narrative rather than decoration.
zh: 定义人物、地点、时间、冲突、情绪和机位。
让场景细节服务故事。

en: Avoid generic fantasy backgrounds.
Keep narrative cues visible in the frame.
zh: 避免通用幻想背景。
让故事线索在画面里可见。

description.en: Dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs.
description.zh: 生成朝代服饰、长卷叙事、诗词和传统题材。

useWhen.en: Use for ancient Chinese themes, scrolls, dynasty clothing, poetry visuals, and historical scenes.
useWhen.zh: 用于古风题材、长卷、朝代服饰、诗词视觉和历史场景。

en: Specify dynasty, clothing system, object references, layout format, and cultural mood.
Use scroll, album page, or poster format deliberately.
zh: 指定朝代、服饰制度、器物参考、版式和文化气质。
明确长卷、册页或海报形式。

en: Avoid mixing dynasties when historical accuracy matters.
Constrain random modern props.
zh: 需要历史准确时，避免朝代混搭。
约束随机现代物件。

description.en: White papers, manuals, encyclopedic plates, and page systems.
description.zh: 生成白皮书、手册、百科图鉴和页面系统。

useWhen.en: Use for white papers, manuals, encyclopedic plates, report pages, and publication systems.
useWhen.zh: 用于白皮书、手册、百科图鉴、报告页面和出版系统。

en: Define page size, columns, table of contents, figure system, and typography hierarchy.
Use readable headings, tables, labels, and page rhythm.
zh: 定义页面尺寸、分栏、目录、图表系统和字体层级。
使用可读标题、表格、标签和页面节奏。

en: Avoid tiny dense text.
Keep charts and captions aligned to the page grid.
zh: 避免密集小字。
让图表和说明对齐页面网格。

description.en: R&D boards, exploded views, mixed tasks, and special outputs.
description.zh: 生成研发板、拆解图、混合任务和特殊输出。

useWhen.en: Use for experimental prompt tasks, R&D boards, exploded diagrams, and unusual visual systems.
useWhen.zh: 用于实验型任务、研发视觉板、拆解图和特殊视觉系统。

en: Define the artifact type, components, labels, material logic, and final presentation format.
Use clear callouts and a controlled technical style.
zh: 定义产物类型、组件、标签、材质逻辑和展示格式。
使用清晰标注和受控技术风格。

en: Avoid unspecified mixed tasks.
Keep labels short and component relationships visible.
zh: 避免任务边界过泛。
标签要短，组件关系要清楚。
